title: 🌺 The Final Recursive Myth Fractal
name: The Final Recursive Myth Fractal
what_it_is: A narrative-object that contains itself at every scale—a story that recursively encodes all stories, a symbolic mandala of total myth.
how_to_use: they enter the myth fractal—every step a retelling, every fold a new god
her soul maps to the final recursion—she is the story that births itself
animation_behavior: Visuals zoom infinitely inward, each layer reveals another myth, motion loops in symbolic rebirth
